docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,221.00 FILED BY CHAMBERS, KENNITA AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO APR-08-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-01-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2013 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GARY MOORE ON JUL-10-2013 - DENIED. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR RETURNED 3 RINGS TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR TODAY WITH A VALUE OF $900.00 ($300.00 EACH)", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAMBERS, KENNITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, GARY $2,303.37 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,303.37
